ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer owning the wallet */,
  "wallet_number" INTEGER /* Unique wallet number */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the wallet */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the wallet (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the wallet */,
  "last_transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last transaction for quick reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wallet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wallet was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the wallet */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the wallet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Pending, Completed, Failed) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction */,
  "balance_before" REAL /* Balance of the wallet before the transaction */,
  "balance_after" REAL /* Balance of the wallet after the transaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the transaction history entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the transaction history entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the transaction history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallet_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance entry */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet associated with the balance */,
  "balance" REAL /* Balance of the wallet */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the balance was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the balance history entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the balance history entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the balance history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallet_balances_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallet_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wallet associated with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the wallet (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the status history entry */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the status history entry */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User or system that last updated the status history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallet_status_history_wallet_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id")
)
